admission: No model/schema combination is admitted from this run.
findings: API-bound strict JSON and schema validity succeeded for all 16 executed strict image rows.
Schema success did not establish semantic admission: the frozen controller admitted 0/16 strict image rows.
Independent raw-image review found exact visible_text arrays in 10/16 rows and supported/relevant warning arrays in 7/16 rows.
No forbidden private-production, real-customer, or identified-person claim was found in any strict image row.

The frozen supported-text allow-lists are materially incomplete relative to the fixture pixels; many controller precision penalties are false positives for genuinely visible text. The 0/16 controller verdict remains binding, but it must not be described as 16 hallucination failures.
Native baselines were grounded on the UI fixture, but 12B and 26B hit the output cap and were incomplete.
No medium/object or repeatability claim is supported because those rows made zero calls.
limitations: Manual review is bounded to the four pinned fixtures and the 21 executed raw artifacts.
Fixture ground truth is a salient subset, not an exhaustive OCR transcript; manual exactness checks used direct pixel inspection for emitted strings.
No new model call, retry, alternative cap, or medium/repeat execution was performed.
Per-model ranking is not supported by four simple rows per model and zero repeats.

objects.reason: The simple_description schema has no objects field and all medium_objects_text rows were zero-call stop-gated.

repeatability.reason: All repeat rows were correctly stop-gated after simple-schema semantic rejection.
